scope: Linear GraphQL operation ledger generated from @linear/sdk generated documents. All SDK mutation rows with fixed documents are modeled as typed reverse-ETL write actions; SDK query rows with fixed documents are modeled as bounded GraphQL streams; raw arbitrary GraphQL remains disallowed.

operation.reason: Raw arbitrary GraphQL would bypass reviewed fixed documents, redaction, and write approval policy; use declared streams, direct reads, or reverse-ETL actions only.
